overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a foggy forest at night. The character moves from dense off-path woodland onto a winding dirt trail, passing a small wooden roadside shrine.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest with thick undergrowth

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through dense forest vegetation, navigating between trees and over uneven grassy terrain

entered.detail: tall coniferous trees forming the forest canopy
thick grass and low bushes covering the forest floor
scattered boulders covered in moss among the vegetation

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dark, foggy forest with dense pine trees and thick grass undergrowth. The ground is uneven natural terrain with no visible path, creating an immersive woodland atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path through pine forest

events.description: character steps from grassy forest floor onto a defined dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt forest path, following the trail as it curves through the trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with visible tire tracks

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a winding dirt path cutting through the forest. The trail curves gently through the dense pine trees, with grass and bushes lining both sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with roadside wooden shrine

events.description: a small wooden roadside shrine appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past the wooden shrine, continuing along the forest trail as it winds deeper into the fog

entered.detail: small wooden structure resembling a wayside shrine or marker beside the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the dirt path, a small wooden shrine structure appears on the right side of the trail. The character passes the shrine and proceeds deeper into the foggy forest as the path continues to wind through the dense trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, foggy forest that transitions from wild woodland onto a structured dirt trail. It begins with Geralt navigating uneven natural terrain amidst dense pine trees and thick grass undergrowth. As he moves forward, the wild landscape gives way to a winding dirt path that curves gently through the towering pines and lining bushes. The scene then shifts as a small wooden shrine appears on the right side of the trail, which the character passes before proceeding deeper into the misty woods.
